action.reasoning: Observation: LPIPS=0.611 still very poor. GT images have alpha=255 everywhere (fully opaque). Debug script crashed on render output type. Analysis: Need to understand render output format, fix background handling to match GT (which appears to use black background with full opacity). Decision: Fix debug script, compare renders vs GT properly, fix predict.py background handling.

command_output.stdout:
=== Renderer forward source ===
    def forward(
        self,
        decoder: torch.nn.Module,
        triplane: torch.Tensor,
        rays_o: torch.Tensor,
        rays_d: torch.Tensor,
    ) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]:
        if triplane.ndim == 4:
            comp_rgb = self._forward(decoder, triplane, rays_o, rays_d)
        else:
            comp_rgb = torch.stack(
                [
                    self._forward(decoder, triplane[i], rays_o[i], rays_d[i])
                    for i in range(triplane.shape[0])
                ],
                dim=0,
            )

        return comp_rgb
